description: Unofficial Google Ads MCP for campaigns, keywords, budgets, and gated mutations.
name: io.github.davidmosiah/google-ads-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Google Ads API developer token from your Google Ads Manager account. Required.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_DEVELOPER_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Google OAuth2 client secret. Prefer storing in ~/.google-ads-mcp/config.json via setup.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Manager (MCC) customer ID used as login-customer-id header, no dashes (e.g., 1234567890). Optional but required for multi-account access.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_LOGIN_CUSTOMER_ID

environmentVariables.description: OAuth redirect URI. Defaults to http://127.0.0.1:3000/callback.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_REDIRECT_URI

environmentVariables.description: Optional local path for OAuth tokens. Defaults to ~/.google-ads-mcp/tokens.json (0600).
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_TOKEN_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional payload mode: summary, structured, or raw. Defaults to structured. raw returns full Google Ads API payloads.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_PRIVACY_MODE

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to enable write tools (pause/resume keywords/campaigns, set bids, set budgets). Default false (read-only). Agents changing real ad spend is high-stakes; review every change.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_ALLOW_MUTATIONS

environmentVariables.description: Optional SQLite cache toggle. Set to true or sqlite to enable.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_CACHE

environmentVariables.description: Optional local SQLite cache path. Defaults to ~/.google-ads-mcp/cache.sqlite.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_CACHE_PATH

environmentVariables.description: Optional cache TTL in seconds. Defaults to 60. Set to 0 to keep entries indefinitely (entries are still overwritten on each hit).
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_CACHE_TTL_SECONDS

environmentVariables.description: Set to true to disable the HTTP retry middleware. Default false.
environmentVariables.name: GOOGLE_ADS_NO_RETRY
